suite.name: Tc14
suite.source: C:\SE\Sprint2\Test\Code\TS009_Users sent messages to the Admin\tc14.robot

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Set Selenium Speed
kw.doc: Sets the delay that is waited after each Selenium command.

test.name: Users Send Chat Message To Admin Successfully

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Does Not Contain Element
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` disappears from the current page.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Location Contains
kw.doc: Waits until the current URL contains ``expected``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Scroll Element Into View
kw.doc: Scrolls the element identified by ``locator`` into view.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.arg: xpath=//input[contains(@placeholder,"พิมพ์ข้อความ")]
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'ภาพหลักฐานเพิ่มเติม' into text field 'xpath=//input[contains(@placeholder,"พิมพ์ข้อความ")]'.
kw.arg: xpath=//input[contains(@placeholder,"พิมพ์ข้อความ")]
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Choose File
kw.msg: Sending C:\SE\Sprint2\Test\Code\TS009_Users sent messages to the Admin\test.jpg to browser.
kw.arg: xpath=//label[@title="แนบรูปภาพ/ไฟล์"]//input
kw.doc: Inputs the ``file_path`` into the file input field ``locator``.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Press Keys
kw.msg: Sending key(s) ('ENTER',) to xpath=//input[contains(@placeholder,"พิมพ์ข้อความ")] element.
Pressing special key ENTER to element.
kw.arg: xpath=//input[contains(@placeholder,"พิมพ์ข้อความ")]
kw.doc: Simulates the user pressing key(s) to an element or on the active browser.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.
